topic: translating verbal expressions to algebraic expressions
latex:
Complete the table.

\begin{tabular}{|p{7cm}|c|c|}
\hline
 & True & False \\
\hline
The expression for ``18 decreased by a number $k$'' is $18 - k$. & & \\
\hline
The expression for ``9 less than a number $w$'' is $9w$. & & \\
\hline
The expression for ``5 more than a number $y$ cubed'' is $5 + y^3$. & & \\
\hline
\end{tabular}
